channel.title: Google on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.description: Recent content in Google on The Gamer's Hollow

item.title: Running Windows on a Chromebook
item.description: A guide to installing windows on a Lenove 100e gen2 ast chromebook (for archive purposes) What you need A Lenovo 100e/300e gen2 ast Chromebook. A sd card or usb drive. A mouse (wired, or dongle only). Power adapter for the chromebook. Ventoy downloaded for your OS Drivers downloaded from this guide. Tiny11 iso downloaded from this guide. Downloads Tiny 11 ISO Ventoy Visual C++ Redist CR50 TPM Driver Chrome EC Driver Radeon GPU Drivers !

item.title: Linus Media Group Got Hacked
item.description: On March 23, 2023, the tech review giant - Linus Tech Tips’ main YouTube channel was hacked and turned into a crypto scam channel. Linus, the CEO of the company, was rudely awakened at 3 am to multiple reports of the hack. The LTT community rallied against the hackers, even going as far as using superchats to warn viewers of the scam livestream. The hack was not complicated and many channels on YouTube have been hacked in the same way.
